title: Subjunctive after emotion chunks
subtitle: Express feelings about what someone does.
overview: Use me alegra que, me molesta que, me preocupa que.
Learn them as chunks before studying every rule.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I am glad you are here.
I am worried that you arrive late.
It bothers me that they do not answer.

items.en: I am glad you can come.

items.es: Me preocupa que Ana esté tan cansada.
items.en: I am worried that Ana is so tired.

items.es: Me molesta que el autobús siempre llegue tarde.
items.en: It bothers me that the bus always arrives late.

items.es: Me da pena que no podamos viajar este mes.
items.en: It makes me sad that we cannot travel this month.
I love that we practice together.
